positive: An intricate, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and cosmic constellations. The central composition shows intertwined geometric patterns forming root structures and blooming celestial flowers. Style: Neo-art deco meets sacred geometry, rendered with clean, thick lines and strong, graphic silhouettes. Color palette: Deep indigo, vibrant neon aqua, ethereal gold, and stark cream white. Lighting: Backlit and glowing, emphasizing contrast and depth. Composition: Highly central and balanced, optimized for repeating fabric patterns, vector quality.
